series_metadata.series_description: Under specified circumstances, the Diversity Officer will conduct an additional review of professional operations reports. This review will include summary inter-office communications, OHP 1298s associated with the particular review (those developed by the Diversity Office and copies of the forms provided by district commanders), process information recorded as entries into the professional operations review spreadsheet (Excel), and any other associated documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: two (2) years current year. ; Electronic: two (2) years current year
